alerts.title: Added: GCC/GSO Labelling Requirement - General labelling requirements for prepackaged foodstuffs
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: New: Verification required. This technical regulation specifies the mandatory labelling requirements for all prepackaged food products in the GCC region.

alerts.title: Added: GCC/GSO Labelling Requirement - Mandatory shelf life periods for food products
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: New: Verification required. This technical regulation specifies the mandatory shelf life periods that must be declared on food product labels.

alerts.title: Added: India Allergen List - Allergen Declaration
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: New: Verification required as per FSSAI Labelling and Display Regulations. Mandatory allergen declarations for seasoning, snack food, and ready-to-eat snacks must be verified against the FSSAI Labelling and Display Regulations.

alerts.title: Added: Japan Additive Limits - Approved additives
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: New: Additives (excluding natural flavoring agents and generally consumed substances used as additives) and preparations/food containing additives are prohibited unless specified by MHLW as unlikely to cause harm. Verification of MHLW specifications is required.. This establishes a positive list system for food additives.

alerts.title: Added: Japan Contaminant Limits - Contamination or foreign substances
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: New: Food or additives which are likely to cause harm to human health due to contamination or the addition of foreign substances or on other grounds must not be sold or handled for sale..

alerts.title: Added: Japan Contaminant Limits - Residues of agricultural chemicals, feed additives, veterinary drugs
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: New: Food containing residues of agricultural chemicals, feed additives, or pharmaceutical products for animals exceeding MHLW specified quantities must not be sold or handled for sale. Verification of MHLW specified quantities is required.. This refers to the 'Positive List System for Agricultural Chemical Residues in Food'.

alerts.title: Added: Japan Contaminant Limits - Toxic or harmful substances
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: New: Food or additives which contain or bear toxic or harmful substances or are suspected to contain or bear such substances must not be sold or handled for sale, unless specified by MHLW as unlikely to cause harm..

alerts.title: Added: Japan Labelling Requirement - Compliance with MHLW established standards and criteria
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: New: Food or additives must not be produced, processed, used, cooked, or preserved using methods that do not conform to MHLW established criteria, and food or additives that do not conform to MHLW established standards must not be produced, imported, processed, used, cooked, preserved, or sold. Verification of specific standards and criteria is required.. MHLW has the authority to establish these standards and criteria.

alerts.title: Added: Japan Microbiology Limits - Pathogen contamination
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: New: Food or additives which are contaminated with pathogens or are suspected to be so, and which are likely to cause harm to human health, must not be sold or handled for sale..

alerts.title: Added: Japan Microbiology Limits - Spoilage
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: New: Food or additives which are rotten or have deteriorated, or are immature, must not be sold or handled for sale, unless unlikely to cause harm and recognized as edible..

alerts.title: Added: Singapore Additive Limits - Food additives
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: New: Do not import or sell if additive is not permitted. This applies to all food products, including seasoning powder, seasoning sauce, snack seasoning, and ready-to-eat snacks.

alerts.title: Modified: Singapore Contaminant Limits - Contaminants (incidental constituents)
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: Old: Must be within SFA’s regulatory limits. New: Do not import or sell if contaminants exceed regulatory limits. This applies to all food products, including seasoning powder, seasoning sauce, snack seasoning, and ready-to-eat snacks.

alerts.title: Added: Singapore Contaminant Limits - Diethylstibestrol, Hexoestrol, Dienoestrol
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: New: Prohibited. This applies if seasoning or snack products contain meat or meat derivatives.

alerts.title: Added: Singapore Labelling Requirement - Declaration of ingredients and additives
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: New: All ingredients and additives must be declared on food labels. This applies to prepacked seasoning powder, seasoning sauce, snack seasoning, and ready-to-eat snacks.

alerts.title: Added: Taiwan Allergen List - Mandatory Allergens
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: New: Crustacean shellfish, mango, peanuts, sesame seeds, milk and goat milk, eggs, tree nuts, gluten-containing cereals, soybeans, fish, and sulphite (as residue sulphur dioxide). These 11 allergens must be declared on prepackaged food labels if present as an ingredient or food additive.

alerts.title: Added: Taiwan Allergen List - Sulphite (Sulphur Dioxide)
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: New: 10 mg/kg or more. Sulphite must be declared as an allergen if the residue sulphur dioxide is 10 mg/kg or more.

alerts.title: Added: Thailand Contaminant Limits - Prohibited Food Products
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: New: Check official source. A list of foods prohibited for production, import, or sale exists and must be strictly adhered to. Prohibition may be due to safety concerns (e.g., contaminants, unapproved substances).

alerts.title: Added: United States Additive Limits - Delisted Color Additives
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: New: Prohibited. Delisted color additives in FDA regulations (21 CFR 81.10 and/or 81.30) are prohibited.

alerts.title: Added: United States Additive Limits - Prohibited Substances
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: New: Prohibited. Substances listed in FDA regulations (21 CFR Part 189) are prohibited from use in food.

alerts.title: Added: United States Allergen List - Major Food Allergens
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: New: Milk, eggs, fish, Crustacean shellfish, tree nuts, peanuts, wheat, soybeans, and sesame. The FASTER Act declared sesame as the 9th major food allergen, effective January 1, 2023. All FDA requirements applicable to major food allergens, including labeling and manufacturing requirements, apply to sesame as of this date.

alerts.title: Added: United States Contaminant Limits - Aflatoxins, total
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: New: 20. Action Level for total aflatoxins in foods.

alerts.title: Added: United States Contaminant Limits - Chemical Contaminants
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: New: Verification Required. Contaminant levels (tolerances, action levels, guidance levels, derived intervention levels, recommended maximum levels, and advisory levels) for poisonous or deleterious substances in human food must be verified using the Chemical Contaminants Transparency Tool and 21 CFR parts 109 and 509.

alerts.title: Added: United States Labelling Requirement - Allergen Preventive Controls
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: New: Mandatory Implementation. Facilities must implement allergen preventive controls to prevent allergen cross-contact in manufacturing and packaging and to prevent undeclared allergens, as per the CGMP & PC rule (21 CFR part 117).

alerts.title: Added: United States Labelling Requirement - Cochineal Extract and Carmine
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: New: Must be Declared on Label. Color additives made from cochineal extract and carmine must be declared on the label of all food and cosmetic products.

alerts.title: Added: United States Labelling Requirement - FD&C Yellow No. 5
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: New: Must be Identified on Label. All products containing FD&C Yellow No. 5 must identify it on their labels.

alerts.title: Added: United States Labelling Requirement - Gluten-Free Claim
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: New: Must Meet FDA Definition. Foods labeled 'gluten-free' must meet the FDA's defined standard for gluten content. Compliance requirements for fermented and hydrolyzed foods bearing the 'gluten-free' claim were established on August 12, 2020.

alerts.title: Added: United States Labelling Requirement - Major Food Allergen Declaration
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: New: Mandatory Declaration. Foods or ingredients containing a major food allergen must be specifically labeled with the name of the allergen source.

alerts.title: Added: United States Labelling Requirement - Major Food Allergen Declaration Format
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: New: Specific Format Required. The allergen's food source must appear in parentheses following the ingredient name (e.g., 'lecithin (soy)') OR immediately after or next to the ingredient list in a 'contains' statement (e.g., 'Contains wheat, milk, and soy.').

alerts.title: Added: United States Labelling Requirement - Specific Allergen Declaration
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: New: Type/Species Declaration Required. The type of tree nut (e.g., almonds, pecans, walnuts), and the species of fish (e.g., bass, flounder, cod) and Crustacean shellfish (e.g., crab, lobster, shrimp) must be declared.

alerts.title: Added: United States Labelling Requirement - Sulfiting Agents
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: New: ≥10. Various sulfiting agents must be declared on food labels when present in food and the concentration is ≥10 parts per million total sulfites.

alerts.title: Removed: China Additive Limits - Food Additives
alerts.details: Old: Verification required against GB2760-2015. Rule no longer appeared in the latest extraction. Verify whether source changed or extraction missed it.

alerts.title: Added: Codex Additive Limits - Permitted Food Additives
alerts.details: New: Verification required. The Codex General Standard for Food Additives (GSFA, Codex STAN 192-1995) online database provides searchable provisions for food additives, functional classes, and food categories. Users are encouraged to consult the Preamble of the GSFA for interpretation.

alerts.title: Removed: Codex Additive Limits - Permitted food additives
alerts.details: Old: Verification required via the Codex General Standard for Food Additives (GSFA) Online Database. Rule no longer appeared in the latest extraction. Verify whether source changed or extraction missed it.

alerts.title: Added: Codex Contaminant Limits - Maximum Levels for Contaminants
alerts.details: New: Verification required. The Codex Alimentarius Commission establishes maximum levels (MLs) and guideline levels for contaminants and naturally occurring toxicants in food and feed, including mycotoxins and metals. These are detailed in the General Standard for Contaminants and Toxins in Food and Feed (CXS 193-1995) and related Codes of Practice.

alerts.title: Removed: Codex Contaminant Limits - Contaminants and naturally occurring toxicants
alerts.details: Old: Verification required via the Codex General Standard for Contaminants and Toxins in Food and Feed (CXS 193-1995) and levels established by the Codex Committee on Contaminants in Food (CCCF). Rule no longer appeared in the latest extraction. Verify whether source changed or extraction missed it.

alerts.title: Removed: Codex Contaminant Limits - Mycotoxins in spices
alerts.details: Old: Follow the Code of Practice for the Prevention and Reduction of Mycotoxins in Spices. Rule no longer appeared in the latest extraction. Verify whether source changed or extraction missed it.

alerts.title: Modified: European Union Additive Limits - Food additives
alerts.details: Old: Verification required. New: Verification required. The database provides information on approved food additives and their conditions of use, based on Annex II of Regulation (EC) No 1333/2008.

alerts.title: Modified: European Union Microbiology Limits - Foodborne bacteria (e.g., Salmonella, Listeria monocytogenes, Enterobacter sakazakii), their toxins and metabolites (e.g., staphylococcal enterotoxins, histamine)
alerts.details: Old: Verification required. New: Verification required. Commission Regulation (EC) No 2073/2005 lays down food safety criteria for relevant foodborne bacteria, their toxins and metabolites, and process hygiene criteria for foods.

alerts.title: Removed: GCC/GSO Allergen List - Allergen declaration on labels
alerts.details: Old: Verification required. Rule no longer appeared in the latest extraction. Verify whether source changed or extraction missed it.

alerts.title: Added: GCC/GSO Labelling Requirement - General requirements for Halal food
alerts.details: New: Verification required. This technical regulation outlines the general requirements for food products to be considered Halal, impacting Halal claims and labelling.

alerts.title: Added: GCC/GSO Labelling Requirement - Optional shelf life periods for food products
alerts.details: New: Verification required. This standard provides guidelines for optional shelf life periods for food products, which may be declared on labels.

alerts.title: Removed: GCC/GSO Labelling Requirement - General labelling requirements for prepackaged foodstuffs
alerts.details: Old: Verification required. Rule no longer appeared in the latest extraction. Verify whether source changed or extraction missed it.

alerts.title: Removed: GCC/GSO Labelling Requirement - Mandatory shelf life declaration
alerts.details: Old: Verification required. Rule no longer appeared in the latest extraction. Verify whether source changed or extraction missed it.

alerts.title: Removed: GCC/GSO Labelling Requirement - Optional shelf life declaration
alerts.details: Old: Verification required. Rule no longer appeared in the latest extraction. Verify whether source changed or extraction missed it.

alerts.title: Added: GCC Labelling Requirement - General labelling requirements for prepackaged food
alerts.details: New: Verification required. Specific labelling requirements for prepackaged food products must be verified against GSO 9:2022.

alerts.title: Removed: GCC Labelling Requirement - General labelling requirements
alerts.details: Old: Verification required. Rule no longer appeared in the latest extraction. Verify whether source changed or extraction missed it.

alerts.title: Removed: GCC Labelling Requirement - General requirements for Halal food
alerts.details: Old: Verification required. Rule no longer appeared in the latest extraction. Verify whether source changed or extraction missed it.

alerts.title: Removed: GCC Labelling Requirement - Mandatory expiration dates
alerts.details: Old: Verification required. Rule no longer appeared in the latest extraction. Verify whether source changed or extraction missed it.

alerts.title: Removed: GCC Labelling Requirement - Voluntary expiration dates
alerts.details: Old: Verification required. Rule no longer appeared in the latest extraction. Verify whether source changed or extraction missed it.

alerts.title: Added: GCC Microbiology Limits - Microbiological limits
alerts.details: New: Verification required. Specific microbiological limits for foodstuffs and food ingredients must be verified against GSO 1016:2015.

alerts.title: Removed: GCC Microbiology Limits - Microbiological limits
alerts.details: Old: Verification required. Rule no longer appeared in the latest extraction. Verify whether source changed or extraction missed it.

alerts.title: Added: India Additive Limits - Food Additives
alerts.details: New: Verification required as per FSSAI Food Additives Regulations. Specific additive limits for seasoning, snack food, and ready-to-eat snacks must be verified against the FSSAI Food Additives Regulations.

alerts.title: Removed: India Additive Limits - Permitted food additives and their maximum levels
alerts.details: Old: Verification required. Rule no longer appeared in the latest extraction. Verify whether source changed or extraction missed it.

alerts.title: Removed: India Allergen List - Declaration of allergens
alerts.details: Old: Verification required. Rule no longer appeared in the latest extraction. Verify whether source changed or extraction missed it.

alerts.title: Modified: India Labelling Requirement - General Labelling Requirements
alerts.details: Old: Verification required. New: Verification required as per FSSAI Labelling and Display Regulations. All food products, including seasoning, snack food, and ready-to-eat snacks, must comply with general labelling requirements.

alerts.title: Modified: Indonesia Additive Limits - Dinitrogen Monoxide (N2O)
alerts.details: Old: Verification required. New: Verification required. This circular letter outlines the provisions for the production, import, registration, and circulation of Dinitrogen Monoxide (N2O) as a food additive. Specific limits and conditions must be verified.

alerts.title: Removed: Indonesia Additive Limits - Food Category-Dependent Limits
alerts.details: Old: Verification required. Rule no longer appeared in the latest extraction. Verify whether source changed or extraction missed it.

alerts.title: Added: Indonesia Labelling Requirement - Compliance with regulations for processed foods
alerts.details: New: Verification required. The Indonesian National Agency of Drug and Food Control (BPOM) maintains 281 regulations specifically for processed foods, which include seasoning and snack products. Specific limits and requirements must be verified by consulting these regulations.

alerts.title: Added: Indonesia Labelling Requirement - Food Categorization
alerts.details: New: Verification required. This regulation defines the categories for processed foods, which is crucial for determining applicable specific regulations regarding additives, contaminants, and labelling.

alerts.title: Removed: Japan Additive Limits - Food Additives
alerts.details: Old: Check official source. Rule no longer appeared in the latest extraction. Verify whether source changed or extraction missed it.

alerts.title: Removed: Japan Contaminant Limits - Agricultural Chemical Residues
alerts.details: Old: Check official source. Rule no longer appeared in the latest extraction. Verify whether source changed or extraction missed it.

alerts.title: Removed: Japan Contaminant Limits - Bovine Spongiform Encephalopathy (BSE) related regulations
alerts.details: Old: Check official source. Rule no longer appeared in the latest extraction. Verify whether source changed or extraction missed it.

alerts.title: Removed: Japan Contaminant Limits - General Contaminants
alerts.details: Old: Check official source. Rule no longer appeared in the latest extraction. Verify whether source changed or extraction missed it.

alerts.title: Removed: Japan Contaminant Limits - Radioactivity
alerts.details: Old: Check official source. Rule no longer appeared in the latest extraction. Verify whether source changed or extraction missed it.

alerts.title: Added: Japan Labelling Requirement - Food safety assurance
alerts.details: New: Food business operators must endeavor to ensure the safety of food, additives, apparatus, or containers and packaging, obtain necessary knowledge and skills, ensure raw material safety, conduct voluntary inspections, and take other necessary measures.. General responsibility for food business operators.

alerts.title: Added: Japan Labelling Requirement - Import certification for animal health
alerts.details: New: Meat, milk, organs of livestock, and meat, organs of poultry, and specified products thereof must not be imported for sale without certificates from the exporting country's governmental organization, certifying they are free from specified diseases or abnormalities.. Applies to animal products.

alerts.title: Added: Japan Labelling Requirement - Import certification for process control
alerts.details: New: Food and additives specified by MHLW as requiring special process control measures must not be imported for sale unless produced or processed in MHLW-specified countries, regions, or facilities that actually take those measures. Verification of MHLW specifications is required..

alerts.title: Added: Japan Labelling Requirement - Import certification for production site sanitation management
alerts.details: New: Food and additives specified by MHLW as requiring certification of production site food sanitation management must not be imported for sale unless accompanied by certificates from the exporting country's governmental organization. Verification of MHLW specifications is required..

alerts.title: Added: Japan Labelling Requirement - Notification of harm from designated ingredients
alerts.details: New: A business handling food containing a 'designated ingredient, etc.' must notify the relevant prefectural governor, etc. without delay upon obtaining information that the food causes or may cause harm to human health. Verification of MHLW designated ingredients is required.. This is a post-market surveillance/reporting requirement.

alerts.title: Added: Japan Labelling Requirement - Record keeping for traceability
alerts.details: New: Food business operators must endeavor to make a record of necessary information (e.g., seller's name) and retain it, to prevent food sanitation hazards..

alerts.title: Added: Japan Labelling Requirement - Specific standards and specifications
alerts.details: New: Verification of specific standards and specifications for food, food additives, apparatus, and containers and packaging, including limits for various parameters, is required.. This document provides the detailed limits and standards referenced by the Food Sanitation Act.

alerts.title: Removed: Japan Labelling Requirement - Food Produced by Recombinant DNA Techniques
alerts.details: Old: Check official source. Rule no longer appeared in the latest extraction. Verify whether source changed or extraction missed it.

alerts.title: Removed: Japan Labelling Requirement - Nutrition Labeling, Health Claims, Special Dietary Uses
alerts.details: Old: Check official source. Rule no longer appeared in the latest extraction. Verify whether source changed or extraction missed it.

alerts.title: Added: Japan Microbiology Limits - General hygiene
alerts.details: New: Food or additives must be collected, produced, processed, used, cooked, stored, transported, displayed and delivered in a clean and sanitary manner.. Applies to all food and additives meant for sale.

alerts.title: Removed: Japan Microbiology Limits - General Microbiological Standards
alerts.details: Old: Check official source. Rule no longer appeared in the latest extraction. Verify whether source changed or extraction missed it.

alerts.title: Removed: Singapore Additive Limits - Awareness of additives
alerts.details: Old: Food manufacturers must be aware of all additives used and obtain information from suppliers. Rule no longer appeared in the latest extraction. Verify whether source changed or extraction missed it.

alerts.title: Removed: Singapore Additive Limits - Calculation for Class II chemical preservatives
alerts.details: Old: Use the Calculation Tool for Class II Chemical Preservatives if two or more are used. Rule no longer appeared in the latest extraction. Verify whether source changed or extraction missed it.

alerts.title: Removed: Singapore Additive Limits - Compliance with regulatory limits
alerts.details: Old: All food businesses must comply. Rule no longer appeared in the latest extraction. Verify whether source changed or extraction missed it.

alerts.title: Removed: Singapore Additive Limits - Criteria for additive allowance
alerts.details: Old: Technological justification and no health risks to consumers. Rule no longer appeared in the latest extraction. Verify whether source changed or extraction missed it.

alerts.title: Removed: Singapore Additive Limits - Food additive limits
alerts.details: Old: Verification required based on additive and food product type. Rule no longer appeared in the latest extraction. Verify whether source changed or extraction missed it.
